name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship conversational AI. Best for general-purpose chat, writing, analysis, and coding assistance.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant. Excels at long documents, nuanced reasoning, coding, and thoughtful analysis.

name: Gemini
description: Google's AI model with deep integration into Google Workspace, Search, and multimodal understanding.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered search engine that provides cited, sourced answers. Great for research and fact-checking.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code. Understands your entire codebase for intelligent autocomplete and editing.

name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal. Plans, writes, and debugs code autonomously.

name: v0
description: Vercel's AI UI generator. Describe what you want and get production-ready React components instantly.

name: Bolt
description: Build full-stack web apps from a prompt. AI writes the code, sets up the project, and deploys it for you.

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder. Describe your app idea and get a working prototype with database and auth.

name: Midjourney
description: Leading AI image generator. Creates stunning, artistic images from text descriptions via Discord.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generator integrated into ChatGPT. Great for illustrations, marketing assets, and concept art.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Best-in-class AI voice synthesis. Clone voices, generate narration, and create realistic speech from text.

name: Suno
description: Generate full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from a text prompt. Surprisingly good quality.

name: Runway
description: Professional AI video generation and editing. Create, extend, and transform videos with Gen-3 Alpha.

name: Descript
description: AI-powered video and podcast editor. Edit media by editing text. Removes filler words, generates captions.

name: Canva AI
description: AI features built into Canva's design platform. Magic Write, image generation, background removal, and more.

name: Gamma
description: AI presentation maker. Create beautiful slides, documents, and web pages from a prompt or outline.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI research assistant. Upload documents and get an AI that understands your sources deeply.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting platform for marketing teams. Generate ads, emails, social posts, and blog content at scale.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation with AI nodes. Connect apps, build AI agents, and automate complex workflows.

name: Make
description: Visual no-code automation platform. Connect 1500+ apps with AI-powered workflows and scenarios.

name: Replit Agent
description: AI agent that builds entire apps from a description. Sets up databases, APIs, and frontends automatically.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer by GitHub. Suggests code completions, writes functions, and explains code in your editor.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator that excels at text in images. Great for logos, posters, and designs with typography.
